passives.name: Transcendence
passives.effects: Basic attacks [[on-attack]] reduce the '''remaining''' cooldowns of your basic abilities by 15%.

effects_structured.raw: Basic attacks reduce the remaining cooldowns of your basic abilities by 15%.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Transcendence procs from basic-attack events and reduces remaining cooldown on non-ultimate abilities by a percentage of current remaining time, not total cooldown.
Player-visible behavior: cooldown acceleration occurs per attack cadence and is strongest when attacking continuously.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: League Wiki (Navori Flickerblade)
sources.used_for: page-level verification of on-attack cooldown-reduction semantics and non-ultimate ability scope
